title: Case number 12629
text:
Applicant: Solicitors Regulation Authority Ltd
Respondent: Christopher Mark Hutchings
Allegations: Code of Conduct 2011, Dishonesty, SRA Principles 2011
Outcome: Not Proved/Dismissed

Executive Summary:
The Tribunal was not satisfied that in the telephone call; Mr Hutchings had made false and or misleading assertions. Accordingly, allegation 1.1 was dismissed. 

The Tribunal was not satisfied that in the telephone call; Mr Hutchings had made an improper threat of litigation. Accordingly, allegation 1.2 was dismissed.
allegations: Code of Conduct 2011, Dishonesty, SRA Principles 2011
